name: AWS Bedrock Knowledge Base Unauthorized Deletion Attempt Detection
description: Unauthorized deletion attempts of an Amazon Bedrock knowledge base detected, potentially indicating malicious activity or a misconfigured access policy. The impact of such events includes the potential loss of valuable information stored within the knowledge base, which can disrupt the AI model service and compromise data integrity.

rules.name: AWS Bedrock Knowledge Base Listing Detection
AWS Bedrock Knowledge Base Unauthorized Deletion Attempt Detection

author: Sunil Bharti
